title: Chapter 207
content:
Chapter 206

The whole castle was in turmoil. Most of the banquet guests had left, but the capital city wasn’t too far from the castle, and most of the high-ranking lords had felt that wave of energy. Those within the castle did so too.

By the time everything ended, about a hundred knights had gathered outside the queen’s chamber in the vast and wide corridor, ready to engage in battle.

Even some battalion units of elite soldiers and more were ready and prepared in the backyard of the queen’s wing.

They had thought it was an enemy attack. Or an assassination attempt on the queen. But by the way they were just waiting outside, as if waiting for orders, said it all. They didn’t really mind whether the queen was killed or not.

Maybe that was why the atmosphere turned even more somber when it was revealed that it was the queen who had broken through.

And quite a bit at that.

And that was also what I was flabbergasted about.

Sure, when I touched the queen, the first thing I checked was her level. She was at the fifth circle realm, around Zara’s level. Not something to be proud of, given Elara was at the peak of the ninth realm.

And not just that, even that circle was in tatters, almost as if it had crumbled down, leaving only remnants behind, most probably due to the curse or seal on her.

However, my yang energy stimulated the dormant yin energy, the one that hadn’t been expelled because it was a part of her body, and that yin energy thoroughly circled through her body, using mana as the source of energy, strengthening her vessels, her meridians, her physique, and what was left of it went back to repairing her circle.

But even then, a lot of it was left, and that energy was used to upgrade her circle from a merely ordinary fifth circle to a whopping seventh circle.

A frost attributed seventh circle.

Fuck.

Was she another cheat character? Those damn plot armors.

Or is it me who’s the cheat? I mean, I possess a magical semen capable of kick-starting her whole procedure.

Should I start a business based on it?

Would surely be profitable, that much I was sure of.

Anyway, the whole thing took about three days. The king never showed his face, but the officials on his side did raise the question whether or not the queen had used some dark maneuvers to gain such strength.

Of course, it was all guised under the fact that they cared about the nation, and they should set an example that no one was exempt from the unorthodox methods. Not even the king.

Yeah, right. The king could slaughter the entire kingdom and offer their bodies to the devil if he wanted to, and that would be just his royal right.

Anyway, their jokes were countered by priests who checked the queen’s body with holy relics and came up with nothing.

But that was the extent of their attempts. Those opposing the queen never crossed the line.

Why, you ask?

“I was ready to kill them all.”

“You did great holding yourself back, master.”

“Hmph. I don’t know where you get that patience from. Such fools are better exterminated.”

“Please be magnanimous and forgive them once. It really was an unusual event.”

One would think the queen wasn’t the queen, but Elara was, the way Elara was seated on a high chair and the queen stood behind her, rubbing her shoulders, placating her so she wouldn’t go on a rampage.

“This is why they walk all over you. You let them.” Elara admonished Elizabeth, who only chuckled wryly because she couldn’t come up with anything.

“Anyways…” Elara said, looking at me and then at Elizabeth, before she said, “While we did gain some time, we couldn’t take care of the core problem.”

Yeah, they couldn’t deal with the core of the problem. They couldn’t, of course.

I could have, but I didn’t. I hadn’t gotten everything I needed yet. Sure, there were some unexpected variables in the way, but still, the core of my plans hadn’t changed.

And now that the queen had recovered and regained her energy, I would be an idiot if I didn’t go through with my plans now that I could enjoy them properly.

No matter what, I was going to fuck the queen in her ass.

Such pure goals I hold.

Hence, the core of the matter wasn’t resolved.

“Yes, master.” Elizabeth softly said, touching her chest, right above her heart.

The seal was still intact and still slowly draining her power. It was just now she had enough power to last her some time, a year or more at best, and then we would be back where we started from.

“That’s not the only good thing out of this,” Elara said, raising her hand and showing the mana cube in her hand, which was freezing something dark and oily inside.

Dark mana.

From the mana, she might be planning to read the mana signature and then track down the caster. For her, it wouldn’t be too difficult. A month at most, if she were lazy.

A few days, if she were to put her mind to it.

But finding the caster didn’t mean the curse would be taken care of, no matter what. There could be other circumstances. The caster could refuse, or something else unforeseen could happen. This was the supernatural world, after all.

So, knowing that most of the cards were in my hand, I stepped forward, keeping my head low and my voice of the same intensity, “My lady…”

“What?” Elara asked, but she wasn’t as sharp as she usually was. I had noticed a clear change in her behavior towards me. She had gotten softer with me. Just a little bit, but softer indeed.

If I were a worm in her eyes before, now I was a cute worm.

Still worm, but not one you would want to squash, but pet.

‘…’

Weakness really is a sin.

“May I suggest something?” I asked.

“What?” Elara asked.

“As you may remember, I told you about my evolved abilities. I have discovered a method thanks to Lady Zara. Perhaps, it could be of help?”

My proposition was simple. A way to help right now, not a supposed method in the future that may or may not work. My resume was already very strong, given the power-up of the queen.

Even if the core matter wasn’t dealt with, they still got something out of it. My methods weren’t quack. That was set in their minds. And with all the other factors mentioned before, which were no doubt in Elara’s mind, she wouldn’t decline this proposal.

“Hmm… If it is tested, it means it’s not harmful. Even if it doesn’t work, we don’t actually lose anything.”

Elizabeth didn’t speak for herself. Elara did it for her. If she didn’t even then, it meant she was going to do whatever Elara asked her to.

Now that Elizabeth had recovered, the affection and soft way Elara had treated her before were long gone. She was treating her like a disciple, not a sick one or a queen.

The question remained as to what extent I could stretch this limit.

“Then… May I?” I asked.

The queen looked at Elara for a while before she nodded and dropped the luxurious clothes she was wearing.

She climbed onto the bed, giving me an ample view of her perfect peach-shaped big ass, gracefully crawling to the head of the bed before she rested her back against it, assuming the only position she knew from before.

Her legs were in an M-shape, her pussy was in clear view, and now that she was no longer pale, well, she still was, but not sickly pale, but icy pale thanks to the frost attribute, her pink pussy was even more beautiful next to her pale skin.

Her expression wasn’t that different from those of other women in this world who think sex is nothing but a task.

It was monotone, something she just had to do, nothing more, nothing less.

There was no anticipation, no blush, no quivering, no memory of before, and no embarrassment from that memory.

She was just there to do it.

“Go ahead,” Elizabeth said.

Kuhum.

I coughed slightly, slightly irked by this fact, but since Freeuse was fantasy, and this was in a way Freeuse, I pushed through the one drawback Freeuse had.

Emotionlessness.

Well, not that it was entirely correct. She would soon show emotions when my dick would be railing her ass like there’s no tomorrow.

Time to dig in.
